reference: Hi, I am eighteen, and I have really bad chest pains. I cough once at a time, and it's hard for me to breathe deeply. Also, when I cough, I get a shooting pain in my head. When I am lying down and get up, I get a horrible headache and feel dizzy. It has been going on for the past four days. Should I go to the emergency room?
text: Hi. I am 18, and I have really bad chest pains. I cough once at a time, and it's hard for me to breathe deeply. Also, when I cough, I get a shooting pain in my head. When I am lying down and get up, I get a horrible headache and feel dizzy. It has been going on for the past four days. Should I go to the emergency room?
